---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new rule or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What gap or risk does this address? If you're proposing a new rule, which
misconfiguration should it catch?

## Proposal

Describe the rule or feature. For a rule, include:

- Suggested ID (`KS-<AREA>-NNN`) and severity
- The field(s) it inspects
- Compliance mapping (CIS / PSS / NSA-CISA / MITRE ATT&CK)
- A concrete remediation

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've already ruled out.
